positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration of a majestic fox silhouette leaping over stylized mountain peaks and a minimalist constellation map. The overall composition should be balanced, featuring strong contrast between the deep midnight blue background and the vivid orange-gold and teal highlights. Use clean, thick linework and a modern, geometric tattoo flash style. The fox should be the central, dynamic subject. Include stylized elements like geometric celestial bodies, flowing river lines, and minimalist stars. Perfect for apparel printing, vector art quality, high detail, symmetrical composition, clean background.
negative: blurry, poor anatomy, text, signature, logo, watermark, artifacts, extra limbs, low detail, noise, gradient, realistic photo, cartoonish, messy
